documents, in a secure location. We retain copies of your records and our work papers from your engagement for up to seven years, after which these documents will be destroyed.\nLAYOUT_TEXT: If you have not db199aa"],"filename":"2025 Jordan).pdf"},{"marker":"[S6]","chunkId":"cmpduj2f40001qy7njga78ojl:cmpnngfdc0003rzbigyhovwsi:cmpnngflc0005rzbikjqus6mi:textract-base-v1:base-document-structure-v1:g1:14","documentId":"cmpnngfdc0003rzbigyhovwsi","pageStart":2,"pageEnd":2,"snippet":"R1C1: Tax and\nR1C2: 11b\nR1C3: Amount from line\nR1C4: 11a (adjusted\nR1C5: gross\nR1C6: income)\nR1C7: \nR1C8: \nR1C9: \nR1C10: \nR1C11: \nR1C12: 11b\nR1C13: 27,645\nR2C1: Credits\nR2C2: 12a\nR2C3: data: {"type":"text-start","id":"text-d6347e2c-8a81-4a36-8dc6-abdd02afb4b3"}

data: {"type":"text-delta","id":"text-d6347e2c-8a81-4a36-8dc6-abdd02afb4b3","delta":"The retrieved documents primarily relate to income, tax information, and record-keeping:\n\n1. **Income Information**: The documents include various statements detailing income types like wages, tips, and other compensation, with specific figures for federal income tax withheld and total amounts from Form W-2. For instance, one document notes an amount of $27,645 as total wages and $1,721 as federal income tax withheld [S3], [S5].\n\n2. **Tax Details**: There are sections indicating adjustments to gross income and associated tax calculations, with a reiteration of amounts already mentioned for clarity [S6]. \n\n3. **State/City Information**: Additionally, there is documentation concerning state and city taxes, indicating the need to refer to additional pages if more than eight states are listed [S1].\n\n4. **Record Retention Policy**: A segment discusses the retention of records and work papers for a period of up to seven years before they are destroyed, emphasizing the importance of secure document management [S4].\n\nThere is no further specific breakdown of filing positions, eligibility, or detailed calculations provided in the context."}
